name: hermes-android-device-controller
description: ADB-based Android execution device controller base for Hermes.

tools.name: android_device_status
tools.description: Return ADB device, screen, and foreground app status for the connected Android device.

tools.name: android_open_app
tools.description: Open an Android package by package name via ADB.

tools.name: android_input_tap
tools.description: Tap screen coordinates via ADB input.

tools.name: android_input_swipe
tools.description: Swipe between screen coordinates via ADB input.

tools.name: android_keyevent
tools.description: Send an Android keyevent code via ADB input.

tools.name: android_dump_screen_xml
tools.description: Dump the current UIAutomator screen XML.

tools.name: android_take_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot from the connected Android device.

tools.name: android_set_mock_location
tools.description: Send a test-environment mock location broadcast to the Hermes Mock Location Helper App.
